title: Tonsil stone removal | What causes tonsil stones?
description: 👨‍⚕️ Welcome to my channel! I’m Dr. Lisa, an Ear, Nose & Throat (ENT) doctor sharing real experiences from daily clinical practice. On this channel, you’ll discover informative and educational videos about common ENT conditions, patient treatments, health tips, and behind-the-scenes moments from the clinic. From ear cleaning and sinus problems to throat infections and medical procedures, my goal is to help viewers better understand ENT health in a simple and engaging way. Whether you’re interested in medical knowledge, curious about a doctor’s daily life, or looking for useful health advice, this channel is here to educate, inspire, and raise awareness about ear, nose, and throat care.
